Following 6 elements can be combined to show empty states.

1. Container. Covers the entire content area: #FFFFFF
2. Guide icon (60px)
3. Empty state title: A short message explaining the current state (or a short guide to getting out of the current state)
4. User instructions (optional)
5. Action button (optional). You can add up to 3 buttons if needed.

Guide icon and message describing current state must be displayed on the content area. Action buttons or user instructions can be shown depending on the situation. Column and container area(data table background) must be shown, with pagination discarded.

No messages to display
No notifications to show
Data cannot be displayed due to an error.

Run time error
Data can not be loaded
Data cannot be displayed because you do not have permission.

Empty state title example
Empty state title and guide icons
Messages need to keep the tone & manner by conditions listed below.

> Accurately guide the user’s actions
> Describe functions of the relevant page
> Depict the datas within an area with clear explanations

Please contact system manager
to resolve this problem.
When data cannot be loaded, there needs to be a description showing there are no data currently, or an explanation of what user needs to do resolve this situation.

This is when the user didn't take actions to display the data.
Clearly guide users to fill the empty space with data. If necessary, provide buttons to accompany user actions.

> Title: Action guide
> Body: Detailed action guide
> Action button (optional): When a function button is not provided in the UI, provide the button within the empty space. (Refer to the Drag & drop example)
(1) No content available because no action was taken by the user.
Tap the Create button above to create a mass alarm.
Drag and drop Silce templates here or click the Import button below to open the template browser.
When a function button is not provided in the UI, provide the button within the empty space.
(2) No contents to display

This is when there is no data to load from the server. Since there is nothing for the user to do, detailed action instructions are not provided.

> Title: No data / No messages
> Body: Not provided
> Action button: Not provided
This is when there is no data to load from the server. Since there is nothing for the user to do, detailed action instructions are not provided.
> Title: No data / No messages

> No contents
> No results
> Error state
Failed to connect to the database server. Please contact system administrator to resolve this problem.

Please try reloading application, 
or contact support if the issue persists.

If data cannot be retrieved due to an error, provide a brief description of the current state, why data cannot be displayed and what actions the user can take to resolve the situation.

> Title: Brief description of the error status
> Body: User behavior guide to resolve the situation
> Action button (optional): When a function button is not provided in the UI, provide the button within the empty space.

You do not have permission to view the data.
Please contact your administrator for permission changes.
Display an instruction allowing the user to request permission.

This state is applied when there is no results match the search term (or filtering) on the client side. (While data has already been loaded from the server to the client app)

> Title: No results found 
> Body: Not provided
> Action button: Not provided
This state is applied when there is no results match the search term (or filtering) on the client side. (While data has already been loaded from the server to
> Title: No results found
When the component area is narrow, it is possible to indicate that there is no search result only with text.

You do not have permission to view the data.
Contact your administrator for permission changes.
1. SamsungOne/SamsunOneKorean 400, 15pt, line-height 18, #000000
2. SamsungOne/SamsungOneKorean 400, 13pt, line-height 18, #606060
• Changed the text size to improve visibility. (13&#859415, 11&#859413)

• Update to the latest components, such as example screens.
   - Change the color of divider (#E5E5E5 -> #CCCCCC)
• In a guide with no search results, add a principle to display only text in a narrow area. and text color #9A9A9A

• Cases where there is no data are classified into two cases depending on whether user action is required or not.
   - When user action is required, action instructions are displayed with priority.
• No data and No maps icons have been changed.
   - Removed the exclamation mark from the icons to classify as non-error.
• Create (+)  icon added.
• Magnifying glass icon added to display No results found message.
